info.title: SCIMServer API
info.description:
Complete SCIM 2.0 Server — 76 endpoints across 18 controllers.

Multi-tenant endpoint architecture, OAuth 2.0, per-endpoint credentials, bulk operations, /Me endpoint, custom resource types, database browser, activity feed, structured logging.

All SCIM paths are scoped under /endpoints/{endpointId}. Admin paths are under /admin.
Global prefix: /scim (configurable via API_PREFIX). URL rewriting: /scim/v2/* → /scim/*.

tags.name: Custom Resources
tags.description: Generic SCIM CRUD for registered custom types

bearerAuth.description: Shared secret, per-endpoint credential, or OAuth JWT

oauthJwt.description: OAuth 2.0 JWT with sub claim — required for /Me

token.description: Plaintext token — returned only on creation

get.description: Requires OAuth JWT with sub claim matching a userName

201.description: Created (save token — cannot be retrieved again)

post.summary: Delete user by PK or SCIM ID
